queries.question: Describe all factors in the yellow light dilemma at intersection_1.
queries.ground_truth: Ego at 55km/h ~30m from intersection, yellow light, sedan_3 following at 15m/58km/h. Hard braking needs >4m/s² deceleration. Rear-end collision risk vs running late yellow.
